languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

languages.text: "Вынуждена согласиться с суждением господина ван Калокса. Шестеренки обычно куда прямолинейнее в общении. Артизан... пытается хитрить".
languages.translation_comment: The characters spoke with the tech-priest, who was acting suspiciously

traits.locale_text: "Вынуждена согласиться с суждением господина ван Калокса. Шестеренки обычно куда прямолинейнее в общении. Артизан... пытается хитрить".

languages.text: 「私はカルオックス師の判断に賛成せざるをえない。歯車は通常、コミュニケーションにおいてはるかに率直である。職人…は狡猾であることを試みているのだ」
languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

traits.locale_text: 「私はカルオックス師の判断に賛成せざるをえない。歯車は通常、コミュニケーションにおいてはるかに率直である。職人…は狡猾であることを試みているのだ。」

languages.text: « Je suis d'accord avec maître van Calox. Les tas de boulons s'expriment habituellement de manière beaucoup plus directe. L'artisan... essaie d'employer la ruse. »
languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

traits.locale_text: « Je suis d'accord avec maître van Calox. Les tas de boulons s'expriment habituellement de manière beaucoup plus directe. L'artisan... essaie d'employer la ruse. »

languages.text: "Ich muss mich dem Urteil von Meister Calox anschließen. Cogs sind für gewöhnlich deutlich offener in ihrer Kommunikation. Der Artifex ... versucht, raffiniert zu sein."
languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

traits.locale_text: "Ich muss mich dem Urteil von Meister Calox anschließen. Cogs sind für gewöhnlich deutlich offener in ihrer Kommunikation. Der Artifex ... versucht, raffiniert zu sein."

languages.text: "Üstat van Calox'un kararına katılmak zorundayım. Dişliler iletişimde genellikle çok daha kabadır. Zanaatkâr... Kurnazlık etmeye çalışıyor."
languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

traits.locale_text: "Üstat van Calox'un kararına katılmak zorundayım. Dişliler iletişimde genellikle çok daha kabadır. Zanaatkâr... Kurnazlık etmeye çalışıyor."

languages.text: «Coincido con la valoración del maestro van Calox. Los hojalatas suelen hablar con mucha franqueza. El artesano... pretende ir de listo».
languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

traits.locale_text: «Coincido con la valoración del maestro van Calox. Los hojalatas suelen hablar con mucha franqueza. El artesano... pretende ir de listo».

languages.text: “我不得不认同冯·卡洛克斯大师的判断。齿轮佬们交流时通常要直率得多。而这位匠人……是在故意耍滑头。”
languages.original_text: "I have to agree with Master van Calox's judgement. Cogs are usually far more blunt in their communication. The Artisan... is trying to be cunning."

traits.locale_text: “我不得不认同冯·卡洛克斯大师的判断。齿轮佬们交流时通常要直率得多。而这位匠人……是在故意耍滑头。”
